subject: BlueHorizon: password reset
body:
Hi Grant,

Someone (hopefully you) asked to reset your BlueHorizon portal password.

Open this link to set a new password - it expires in 1 hour:
https://bluehorizon.club/portal.html#reset=grantstec:129074909605a1ea74a1a964bf71cb02d358675f79b5a265

If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email; your password stays the same.

- BlueHorizon Portal
